user_prompt: Urgent Vendetta gunship a recalibration needed
prayer:
Approach the Vendetta gunship with mechadendrites extended in supplication, invoking the Omnissiah's grace upon its noble frame.
Beseech the Machine Spirit of the Vendetta gunship to yield to recalibration, purging misalignments from its gyro-stabilizers and lascannon servos.
Anoint the flight control cogitators with sacred unguents whilst chanting the Canticle of True Bearing.
Seal the rite by verifying harmonious data flows, honouring the Vendetta gunship's restored precision under the Omnissiah's gaze.

user_prompt: The Basilisk artillery needs a consecration
prayer:
Kneel before the Basilisk artillery, intoning the Litany of Consecration to awaken its dormant holiness.
Purify the earthshaker cannon's barrel with ablative incense, consecrating its wrathful mechanisms to the Machine God's will.
Invoke the Basilisk artillery's Machine Spirit thrice, binding it anew in fealty through binary psalms.
Conclude with auspex blessings, ensuring the Basilisk artillery stands sanctified against the heretic foe.

Commence repair upon the Hellhound by circumambulating its chassis, murmuring apologetics to its inflamed spirit.
Extract damaged promethium injectors from the Hellhound, replacing them amidst chants of restoration.
Realign the flame-projector arrays with precision mechadendrites, beseeching the Machine Spirit's forgiveness for prior wounds.
Finalise the Hellhound's repair by igniting a test belch of purified fire, glorifying the Omnissiah's incendiary might.

user_prompt: Consecrate the pteraxii sterylizor before emergency procedure
prayer:
Prepare the pteraxii sterylizor for emergency procedure by anointing its neural vanes with electro-sanctified oil.
Invoke the pteraxii sterylizor's Machine Spirit with urgent binaric pleas, readying it for the perilous rite.
Stabilise its bio-arc linkages through incantatory overrides, ensuring fidelity during the emergency procedure.
Seal the pteraxii sterylizor's sanctity with a vow of resilience, under the Omnissiah's unyielding vigil.

user_prompt: Offer prayer for memograph implant an engagement
prayer:
Present the memograph implant before the noospheric altar, beseeching engagement of its crystalline vaults.
Initiate synaptic linkage with devotional data-pulses, awakening the memograph implant's archived wisdom.
Chant the Rite of Engagement over the memograph implant, harmonising flesh-machine interfaces.
Verify the memograph implant's full engagement through mnemonic diagnostics, praising the Omnissiah's perfect recall.

user_prompt: The Kastelan robot requires an engagement
prayer:
Awaken the Kastelan robot by striking its ceramite hull with the Forge Hammer of Activation.
Command engagement of the Kastelan robot's data-cores, invoking its ancient guardian protocols.
Anoint the Kastelan robot's manipulator limbs whilst reciting the Protocol of Unyielding Duty.
Affirm engagement complete as the Kastelan robot stirs, its Machine Spirit bound eternally to the Omnissiah.

Surround the data-arc with purity seals, commencing initialization with the Canticle of First Boot.
Purge null-data from the data-arc's vaults, beseeching its Machine Spirit to embrace awakening.
Initiate core sequencing through electro-liturgical rites, honouring the data-arc's nascent hunger for knowledge.
Conclude initialization of the data-arc by noospheric communion, under the Omnissiah's boundless archive.

user_prompt: Ready the null field generator for initialization
prayer:
Isolate the null field generator within a Faraday shrine, invoking initialization with void-psalms.
Calibrate its phase inducers whilst anointing with null-conductive balms, placating the Machine Spirit.
Activate the null field generator's genesis cycle, weaving warp-repellant cantrips into its coils.
Bless the initialized null field generator, shielding the faithful from the immaterium's grasp by Omnissiah's decree.

user_prompt: The conversion beamer needs a maintenance
prayer:
Undertake maintenance upon the conversion beamer by reciting the Benediction of Subatomic Harmony.
Disassemble the conversion beamer's focusing crystals, purging entropic residue with sanctified abrasives.
Realign gravitic matrices amidst binaric litanies, soothing the Machine Spirit's dissonance.
Reassemble and test the conversion beamer, its matter-disrupting fury renewed in the Omnissiah's name.

user_prompt: What's the prayer for long las a maintenance?
prayer:
Begin maintenance of the long las by enveloping it in incense veils, honouring its sniper's precision.
Extract heat-sink manifolds from the long las, replacing with sanctified alloys through repair chants.
Polish the emitter lens with mech-rosary beads, invoking the Machine Spirit's unerring sight.
Complete long las maintenance with a diagnostic las-bolt, praising the Omnissiah's distant judgement.
